name: tt-b
description: Model-aware agent workflow kit for Claude Code. 8 hooks, 12 MCP tools, 10+ skills. One-click install via npx.

scripts.verify: node --check bin/tt-b-setup.js && node --check bin/import-agent-workflow.js && node --check bin/claude-global-deploy.js && node --check bin/tt-b-mcp-server.js && node --check bin/tt-b-rest-server.js && node --check bin/tt-b-lifecycle.js && node --check bin/tt-b-cleanup.js && node --check bin/tt-b-codex-install.js && node --check bin/tt-b-openclaw-install.js && node --check functions/index.js && node --check packages/plugin/index.js && node --check packages/integrations/index.js && node --check .claude/bin/model-preflight.js && node --check .claude/bin/memory-reminder.js && node bin/tt-b-setup.js --help && node bin/import-agent-workflow.js --help && node bin/claude-global-deploy.js --help && node bin/tt-b-cleanup.js --help
